title: Childrens Trumpet - Toy Musical Trumpet - Toy Learning and Practicing Musical Instrument - Suitable for 18 months - Learn as they Play
features: Learn as they Play - My 1st Trumpet Toy is suitable for children aged 18 months +
Including 4 colourful buttons to press on the trumpet which change the notes once the player blows into the trumpet
Start your child's creativity and help them develop strong musical skills with their first musical instrument fostering a love of music and rhythm for educational pleasure

Watch your kids jam to their heart's content with this trumpet toy. Ergonomically designed for small hands, its made of lightweight and odorless ABS for a comfortably fun experience that wont cause discomfort
The trumpet won't play a note until the buttons are pressed - This teaches the child musical ability
description: Our child friendly design makes playing easy, and the toy mimics a real trumpet, awakening your child's interest in music. Perfect for helping boys and girls in their early days, this toy will provide hours of entertainment & fun Specifications: Product material: ABS Product weight: about 172g Product size: 32cm x 9cm x 9cm Packing List: 1* Trumpet Toy for Kids
